intro: Angelica sinensis, also known as Dong Quai, is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb commonly used to promote women's health and relieve menstrual discomfort. The capsules made from this herb are often taken to alleviate symptoms such as bloating, cramps, and mood swings associated with premenstrual syndrome. However, it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Angelica sinensis capsules, especially if you have any underlying medical conditions or are taking other medications.
